sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaSearch, FaBook, FaFileAlt, FaGraduationCap, FaDownload, FaArrowRight, FaStar, FaUsers, FaClock, FaCloudUploadAlt, FaChartLine, FaAward } from 'react-icons/fa'; import './Home.css'; const Home = () => { const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(''); const [animatedStats, setAnimatedStats] = useState([ { value: 0, target: 5000, title: 'Total Notes', icon: , color: '#4f46e5' }, { value: 0, target: 2000, title: 'PYQs', icon: , color: '#ec4899' }, { value: 0, target: 5, title: 'Courses', icon: , color: '#f59e0b' }, { value: 0, target: 15000, title: 'Downloads', icon: , color: '#10b981' }, ]); const [popularCourses, setPopularCourses] = useState([ { id: 1, name: 'B.Tech', icon: '⚡', students: 2547, color: '#4f46e5', bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5, #818cf8)' }, { id: 2, name: 'BCA', icon: '💻', students: 1832, color: '#ec4899', bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #ec4899, #f472b6)' }, { id: 3, name: 'BBA', icon: '📊', students: 1521, color: '#f59e0b', bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #fbbf24)' }, { id: 4, name: 'MBA', icon: '🎯', students: 1245, color: '#10b981', bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #34d399)' }, { id: 5, name: 'MCA', icon: '🔧', students: 978, color: '#8b5cf6', bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #a78bfa)' }, { id: 6, name: 'B.Com', icon: '💰', students: 1134, color: '#ef4444', bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #ef4444, #f87171)' }, ]); const [testimonials, setTestimonials] = useState([ { id: 1, name: 'Rahul Sharma', course: 'B.Tech CSE', text: 'Best platform for study materials! All notes are well-organized and up-to-date.', rating: 5, avatar: '👨‍🎓' }, { id: 2, name: 'Priya Patel', course: 'BCA', text: 'PYQs section helped me a lot in exam preparation. Highly recommended!', rating: 5, avatar: '👩‍🎓' }, { id: 3, name: 'Amit Kumar', course: 'MBA', text: 'Free and high-quality content. Saved my semester!', rating: 5, avatar: '👨‍💼' }, ]); const [recentUploads, setRecentUploads] = useState([ { id: 1, title: 'Data Structures & Algorithms', type: 'Notes', course: 'B.Tech', time: '2 hours ago', downloads: 234 }, { id: 2, title: 'Python Programming - 2024 PYQ', type: 'PYQ', course: 'BCA', time: '5 hours ago', downloads: 189 }, { id: 3, title: 'DBMS Complete Syllabus', type: 'Syllabus', course: 'MCA', time: '1 day ago', downloads: 156 }, { id: 4, title: 'Operating Systems Notes', type: 'Notes', course: 'B.Tech', time: '2 days ago', downloads: 145 }, { id: 5, title: 'Digital Marketing Guide', type: 'Notes', course: 'BBA', time: '3 days ago', downloads: 98 }, { id: 6, title: 'Financial Management PYQ', type: 'PYQ', course: 'MBA', time: '4 days ago', downloads: 87 }, ]); const navigate = useNavigate(); // Animated counter effect useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setAnimatedStats(prev => prev.map(stat => ({ ...stat, value: stat.value < stat.target ? Math.min(stat.value + Math.ceil(stat.target / 50), stat.target) : stat.target }))); }, 20); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); const handleSearch = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (searchQuery.trim()) { navigate(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery)}`); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section with Particles */}
{[...Array(20)].map((_, i) => (
))}
India's Best Study Platform

Welcome to Study Portal

Your complete learning ecosystem. Access notes, previous year papers, syllabus, and more — all in one place, absolutely free.

setSearchQuery(e.target.value)} />
10K+ Active Users
24/7 Availability
Daily Updates
{/* Animated Stats Section */}
{animatedStats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.icon}

{stat.value.toLocaleString()}+

{stat.title}

))}
{/* Popular Courses Section */}

Popular Courses

Most enrolled courses by students

{popularCourses.map((course) => (
navigate(`/course/${course.id}`)} style={{ background: course.bg }} >
{course.icon}

{course.name}

{course.students.toLocaleString()}+ Students
))}
{/* Recent Uploads Section */}

Recent Uploads

Latest study materials added by educators

{recentUploads.map((item) => (
{item.type}

{item.title}

{item.course} {item.time}
{item.downloads} downloads
))}
{/* Testimonials Section */}

What Students Say

Trusted by thousands of students

{testimonials.map((testimonial) => (
{testimonial.avatar}

{testimonial.name}

{testimonial.course}

{[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

"{testimonial.text}"

))}
{/* CTA Banner */}

Ready to Ace Your Exams?

Join 10,000+ students who are already learning with us

); }; export default Home;
